initial_program:
% Dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _)}.

% Max row / max column indices
max_row(Rmax) :- Rmax = N - 1.
max_col(Cmax) :- Cmax = M - 1.

% Border cells (nonwall cells on the outer perimeter)
border(R,C) :- input(R,C,V), V != 3, R = 0.
border(R,C) :- input(R,C,V), V != 3, R = Rmax.
border(R,C) :- input(R,C,V), V != 3, C = 0.
border(R,C) :- input(R,C,V), V != 3, C = Cmax.

% Adjacent offsets
delta(0,1).
delta(0,-1).
delta(1,0).
delta(-1,0).

% Adjacent nonwall cells
adj(R1,C1,R2,C2) :- delta(DR,DC), R2 = R1 + DR, C2 = C1 + DC, input(R2,C2,V), V != 3.

% Cells reachable from the border through 4connected nonwall cells
outside(R,C) :- border(R,C).
outside(R2,C2) :- outside(R1,C1), adj(R1,C1,R2,C2), input(R2,C2,V), V != 3.

% Output colours
output(R,C,3) :- input(R,C,3).
output(R,C,0) :- input(R,C,0), outside(R,C).
output(R,C,4) :- input(R,C,0).
output(R,C,V) :- input(R,C,V), V != 0, V != 3.

% Forbid colour4 on the border for zero cells
:- output(R,C,4), input(R,C,0), outside(R,C).

% Exactly one colour per cell
output_cell(R,C) :- input(R,C,V).
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).

% Dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{C : input(_, C, _)}.

% Max row / max column indices
max_row(Rmax) :- Rmax = N - 1.
max_col(Cmax) :- Cmax = M - 1.

% Border cells (nonwall cells on the outer perimeter)
border(R,C) :- input(R,C,V), V != 3, R = 0.
border(R,C) :- input(R,C,V), V != 3, R = Rmax.
border(R,C) :- input(R,C,V), V != 3, C = 0.
border(R,C) :- input(R,C,V), V != 3, C = Cmax.

% Adjacent offsets
delta(0,1).
delta(0,-1).
delta(1,0).
delta(-1,0).

% Adjacent nonwall cells
adj(R1,C1,R2,C2) :- delta(DR,DC), R2 = R1 + DR, C2 = C1 + DC, input(R2,C2,V), V != 3.

% Cells reachable from the border through 4connected nonwall cells
outside(R,C) :- border(R,C).
outside(R2,C2) :- outside(R1,C1), adj(R1,C1,R2,C2), input(R2,C2,V), V != 3.

% Output colours
output(R,C,3) :- input(R,C,3).
output(R,C,0) :- input(R,C,0), outside(R,C).
output(R,C,4) :- input(R,C,0).
output(R,C,V) :- input(R,C,V), V != 0, V != 3.

% Forbid colour4 on the border for zero cells
:- output(R,C,4), input(R,C,0), outside(R,C).

% Exactly one colour per cell
output_cell(R,C) :- input(R,C,V).
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R, C).
